ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passwords" (
  "password_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password */,
  "password" TEXT /* The password itself */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the password (e.g., password-related, simple-alphanumeric) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value associated with the password (e.g., time to crack) */,
  "time_unit" TEXT /* Unit of time for the value (e.g., years, minutes) */,
  "offline_crack_sec" REAL /* Time it would take to crack the password offline */,
  "rank_alt" INTEGER /* Alternate rank for the password */,
  "strength" INTEGER /* Strength score of the password */,
  "font_size" INTEGER /* Font size for display purposes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the password was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the password was last updated */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date and time the password expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the password (e.g., active, inactive, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("password_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passwords_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "description_lang" TEXT /* Description of the category in multiple languages */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "description_lang" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm in multiple languages */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_strength" (
  "strength_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strength score */,
  "password_id" INTEGER /* ID of the password */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used */,
  "strength_score" REAL /* Strength score of the password */,
  "calculated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the strength score was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strength_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_strength_password_id FOREIGN KEY ("password_id") REFERENCES passwords ("password_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_strength_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., security analyst, administrator, end-user) */,
  "role_lang" TEXT /* Role of the user in multiple languages */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password check */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who checked the password */,
  "password_id" INTEGER /* ID of the password checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the password was checked */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the password check (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_checks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_checks_password_id FOREIGN KEY ("password_id") REFERENCES passwords ("password_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the recommendation */,
  "password_id" INTEGER /* ID of the password for which the recommendation was made */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation for improving password strength */,
  "recommended_at" TEXT /* Date and time the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_password_id FOREIGN KEY ("password_id") REFERENCES passwords ("password_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "common_passwords" (
  "common_password_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each common password */,
  "password" TEXT /* The common password itself */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the common password (e.g., password-related, simple-alphanumeric) */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of use of the common password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("common_password_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_common_passwords_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being tracked (e.g., average password strength, number of weak passwords) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., percentage, count) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)
